name: Mississippi Mud Cake2
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a rectangular cake pan and place a greased piece of waxed paper in the bottom.
2. Sift together flour, cocoa, and salt; set aside in a small bowl.
3. Cream sugar and butter. Add vanilla.
4. Add eggs one at a time, then gradually add dry ingredients until a batter is formed.
5. Turn batter into cake pan and bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 to 30 minutes on the middle rack of your oven.
6. Cool on a wire rack and ice.
Icing:
1. Sift sugar and cocoa.
2. Mix in butter, milk, and vanilla.
